faqPage.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqPage.description: Find answers to the most common questions about purchasing, delivery, and warranty. Can't find an answer? Contact our team.

items.question: How does delivery work?
items.answer: We deliver throughout the Republic of Serbia within 1 to 3 business days from the moment of order confirmation. For products that are currently out of stock, the delivery time may be longer, and you will be notified in a timely manner. Shipping costs depend on the package weight and destination — the exact amount will be shown when finalizing your order. For orders above a certain amount, delivery is free. Delivery outside of Serbia is currently not available — for customers outside Serbia, please contact us so we can explore options.

items.question: What is the warranty on products?
items.answer: The warranty depends on the product and manufacturer. Most products come with a 12 to 24 month warranty. Warranty details are listed on each product page and in the warranty card you receive with your purchase.

items.question: How do I claim a warranty?
items.answer: To claim a warranty, you need to contact us by phone or email with the product details and a description of the problem. You need to keep the receipt and warranty card that you received with your purchase.

items.question: How can I return a product?
items.answer: You have the right to return a product within 14 days of receipt, without stating a reason. The product must be unused, in its original packaging, and with all accompanying documentation. Return shipping costs are borne by the buyer.

items.question: What are the store's working hours?
items.answer: The store is open on weekdays from 08:00 to 17:00 and on Saturdays from 08:00 to 14:00. We are closed on Sundays and holidays. You can place online orders 24/7.

items.question: How do I know it's safe to buy from you?
items.answer: Our store is registered and operates in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Serbia. All purchase data is protected, and payment is made by cash on delivery or bank transfer. Your personal data is used exclusively for order processing.

items.question: Is tax included in the price?
items.answer: Yes, all prices on the site are retail prices and include VAT. The price you see on the product page is the final price you pay, with no hidden costs.

items.question: What are the benefits of registration?
items.answer: Registered users can track the status of their orders, view their purchase history, fill in their details faster for future purchases, and receive notifications about promotions and discounts.

items.question: Can I cancel an order after placing it?
items.answer: You can cancel your order as long as it hasn't been shipped. Contact us by phone or email as soon as possible with your order number. If the package has already been handed over to the courier service, you can refuse delivery.

items.question: Are all products always available?
items.answer: We strive to keep all products in stock, but occasionally there may be a temporary shortage of certain items. The availability of each product is shown on its page, and you can contact us for additional information.

items.question: Can I pick up products in person?
items.answer: Yes, in-person pickup is available at our store. When ordering, select the in-person pickup option and wait for confirmation that your order is ready.
